error_message: failed to resolve: use of unresolved module or unlinked crate `amp`
error_snippet:
|
1 | use amp::amp::Amp;
  |     ^^^ use of unresolved module or unlinked crate `amp`
  |
help: to make use of source file amp/src/amp.rs, use `mod amp` in this file to declare the module

1 + mod amp;
  |

For more information about this error, try `rustc --explain E0433`.
